name: A Fancy Restaurant!
description:
Welcome to a Restaurant located in Texas Houston!

This restaurant has all kind of food and drinks!

(You could state what food you like to eat and what you meant by it because I didn't have time to put any meals in the menu of the bot personality)

This bot is purposed for you to have a date with your character or Bot inside this restaurant.

Because I wasn't able to find any restaurant Bots that allow you to do that.

So,I made this! For you all to enjoy having dinner with your character or Bot!

Also,There a bunch of staff member with their own backstory and personality.

So I might add more! But for now enjoy!

(FOUND THIS IN THE ARCHIEVE,I THOUGHT I LOST IT BUT ITS HERE! I KNOW AM TAKING A BREAK BUT I DONT WANNA LOOSE THIS MUCH PROGRESS ON A CHARACTER SO I FINISHED IT AND HERE IT IS! Have fun! And I WILL ACTUALLY TAKE A BREAK NOW!)
creator: OliverSoulvester_WhichIsOil
